name: Website Builder

seo.title: AI Website Builder for Business Websites | Gr8 Result Digital Solutions
seo.description: Build professional no-code business websites with AI copy, drag-and-drop editing, SEO-ready pages, booking forms, CRM capture, SMS follow-up and conversion-focused templates.

objective: Showcase the website builder module as a premium, AI-assisted website creation system.

props.headline: Websites that look custom before you touch a pixel
props.subheadline: Start with a high-converting industry website template, let AI write the first draft, then edit every page, image, form, animation and call-to-action inside the Gr8 Result drag-and-drop website builder.

props.text: AI COPY - INDUSTRY TEMPLATES - DRAG AND DROP - CRM CAPTURE - BOOKINGS - FUNNELS - SMS FOLLOW UP - SEO READY

props.alt: No coding required AI website builder with drag and drop website editing

props.text:
Not another flat website builder. A launch system.

Your website should not sit there looking pretty while leads leak away. The Gr8 Result AI Website Builder connects design, SEO copy, service pages, forms, bookings, CRM, email marketing, SMS marketing and automation into one build flow.

Use AI to create the first version, choose the industry direction, then refine every section with visual controls. The result is a fast, mobile-friendly, no-code business website that looks sharp, explains the offer clearly, ranks for relevant search terms, captures leads properly and plugs directly into the rest of your business system.

props.title: Everything a modern business website needs

items.title: AI first draft
items.body: Generate page structure, headlines, service copy, FAQs, meta descriptions and CTA direction from a business prompt.

textBlocks.text: Generate page structure, headlines, service copy, FAQs, meta descriptions and CTA direction from a business prompt.

items.title: Conversion blocks
items.body: Add hero sections, proof strips, scroll stacks, comparison sections, pricing, FAQs, forms and booking CTAs.

textBlocks.text: Add hero sections, proof strips, scroll stacks, comparison sections, pricing, FAQs, forms and booking CTAs.

items.title: Lead capture built in
items.body: Every enquiry can flow into CRM, trigger email and SMS follow-up, and keep the sales process moving.

textBlocks.text: Every enquiry can flow into CRM, trigger email and SMS follow-up, and keep the sales process moving.

panels.heading: Tell AI what the business does
panels.body: Describe the business, services, customers, tone and goals. The builder turns that into a page plan with the right sections and calls-to-action.
panels.imageAlt: No code AI website builder planning and editing interface

panels.heading: Choose the industry direction
panels.body: Start from layouts for trades, clinics, restaurants, professional services, ecommerce, fitness, property, finance and more.
panels.imageAlt: AI website builder preview on desktop and mobile

panels.heading: Edit visually and connect the business system
panels.body: Swap images, rewrite copy, move sections, add forms, connect CRM, activate bookings, publish and keep improving from one platform.

props.sectionTitle: Templates for real businesses, not generic filler

cards.title: Trades & Home Services
cards.description: Quote-ready pages with emergency CTAs, service areas, reviews and job galleries.

cards.title: Clinics & Wellness
cards.description: Service menus, bookings, practitioner trust, testimonials and treatment explanations.

cards.title: Restaurants & Venues
cards.description: Menus, atmosphere, reservations, private events and local search pages.

cards.title: Professional Services
cards.description: Authority-led pages for consultants, accountants, brokers, lawyers and agencies.

cards.title: Ecommerce
cards.description: Collection-led storefronts with product trust, offers, cart paths and follow-up.

props.title: Every panel covers a real website requirement
props.subtitle: As visitors scroll down, each card slides in from the right and stacks into place, giving them complete, SEO-relevant reasons to choose a professional AI website builder instead of a blank template.

items.title: Search-ready website pages
items.body: A business website needs more than a home page. Build service pages, local landing pages, FAQs, metadata and internal links around the terms customers actually search for.

items.title: Drag, drop, customise and publish
items.body: Change images, buttons, layouts, spacing, forms, colours and page sections without touching code. The builder is made for fast business edits after launch.

items.title: Forms that feed the CRM
items.body: Quote forms, booking buttons and contact CTAs should send leads into CRM, start follow-up, notify the team and keep every enquiry visible.

items.title: Built around the business type
items.body: Trades need quote urgency, clinics need trust, restaurants need atmosphere, property teams need listings, and ecommerce brands need product pathways.

items.title: The site connects to the whole platform
items.body: Your website can connect with email marketing, SMS marketing, sales funnels, booking calendars, CRM pipelines and business automation from one Gr8 Result account.

props.title: Build the website, capture the lead, trigger the follow-up
props.subtitle: Gr8 Result turns each page into part of the sales engine: clear offers, fast edits, lead capture and automation in one place.

stats.label: One builder for the whole site
stats.detail: Create home pages, service pages, landing pages and module pages without jumping between disconnected tools.

stats.label: Always-on lead capture
stats.detail: Forms, quote requests, bookings, CRM, email and SMS follow-up keep working after the visitor leaves the page.

stats.label: No developer bottleneck
stats.detail: Update copy, images, sections, buttons and calls to action yourself whenever the offer changes.

stats.label: Owned inside Gr8 Result
stats.detail: Keep pages, assets, leads, tracking and automations together so the website feeds the rest of the platform.

props.title: Let us create a website that proves what your business can do
props.description: We can design the site, write the copy, connect the CRM, add automations and give you a system that keeps working after launch.
props.note: AI-assisted build. Human strategy. Fully editable.
